attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
 COALESCE(BK_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT, -999),
 COALESCE(BK_REVENUE_OR_COGS_TYPE_CD,'UNKNOWN'),
 COALESCE(BK_PRODUCT_KEY,-999),
 COALESCE(GOODS_PRODUCT_KEY,-999),
 COALESCE(BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD,'UNKNW'),
 COALESCE(BK_REV_MEASURE_TRNSCTN_TYPE_CD,'UNKNOWN   '),
 DV_TRIANGULATION_TYPE_ID_INT,
 COALESCE(BK_PRDT_SUBGROUP_ALLOC_SRC_CD,'UNKNOWN'),
 COALESCE(BK_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,-999),
 COALESCE(BK_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,-999)  ORIGINAL_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
 COALESCE(BK_TRNGLTD_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,-999),
 COALESCE(SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,-9999),
 COALESCE(BK_SRC_RPRTD_SRVC_CONTRACT_NUM,'UNKNOWN'),
 COALESCE(COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT,0),
 BK_COMPANY_CD, 
 COALESCE(BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CD,'UNK'),
 COALESCE(DV_PRODUCT_TYPE,'UNKNOWN'),
 COALESCE(DV_PNL_LINE_ITEM_NAME,'UNKNOWN'),
 COALESCE(CE_COUNTRY_NAME,'CISCO'),
 COALESCE(END_CUSTOMER_KEY,-999),
 COALESCE(BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,-999),
 COALESCE(SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,-999),
 COALESCE(SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,-999),
 CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) EDW_CREATE_DTM,
 USER EDW_CREATE_USER,
 CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
 USER EDW_UPDATE_USER,
 'FDI_REV' DV_PNL_REV_COST_TYPE,
 '-999' AS DV_DEAL_ID,
 DV_RECURRING_OFFER_CD
 FROM 
 $$STGDB.WI_PNL_REV_COST_MSR_FDI_REV

SELECT 
  COALESCE(BK_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT, -999),
  'FDI_REV' DV_PNL_REV_COST_TYPE,
  COALESCE(BK_REVENUE_OR_COGS_TYPE_CD,'UNKNOWN'),
  COALESCE(BK_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,-999)  ORIGINAL_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
  COALESCE(DV_PNL_LINE_ITEM_NAME,'UNKNOWN'),
  'UNKNOWN' PARTNER_TYPE_CD, 
  '=' CHANNEL_FLG              ,
  'UNKNOWN' AS_OF_FSC_MTH_PARTNER_TYPE_CD,
  '=' AS_OF_FSC_MTH_CHANNEL_FLG,
  'OTHERS' DV_ROUTE_TO_MARKET_CD,
  'OTHERS' DV_AS_OF_FSC_MTH_RTM_CD,  
  1 STK_RTM_RATIO,
  CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) EDW_CREATE_DTM,
  USER EDW_CREATE_USER,
  CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
  USER EDW_UPDATE_USER   
  FROM 
  $$STGDB.WI_PNL_REV_COST_MSR_FDI_REV
GROUP BY 1,3,4,5
